Container.Name: AppFlowy-Cloud
Container.Overview: Step 5/7: AppFlowy Cloud — the core Rust backend providing REST API, WebSocket real-time collaboration, file management, and AI integration. Part of the AppFlowy Cloud stack.
Container.Requires: Custom Docker network named "appflowy" must exist before deploying any container in this stack. Create it via SSH or the Unraid terminal: docker network create appflowy — Network Type is pre-set to "appflowy" by default, verify it is selected.
Container.Description:
AppFlowy Cloud — the primary Rust-based backend service for AppFlowy. Provides the REST API (:8000), WebSocket collaboration endpoints, document storage, and AI features.

Required: Set Base URL, JWT Secret (same as AppFlowy-GoTrue), database/Redis/MinIO credentials.

Deploy order: (1) AppFlowy-Postgres → (2) AppFlowy-Redis → (3) AppFlowy-MinIO → (4) AppFlowy-GoTrue → (5) AppFlowy-Cloud → (6) AppFlowy-Admin, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Worker, AppFlowy-Search → (7) AppFlowy-Nginx

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Public-facing base URL of your AppFlowy instance (e.g. http://192.168.1.100 or https://appflowy.yourdomain.com). No trailing slash.

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Shared JWT secret. MUST be identical to GOTRUE_JWT_SECRET in AppFlowy-GoTrue. Keep private.

Config.Name: Web URL
Config.Description: URL where AppFlowy Web is served. Usually the same as Base URL.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. Update password and host if changed.

Config.Name: Redis URI
Config.Description: Redis connection URI.

Config.Name: GoTrue Base URL
Config.Description: Internal URL of the AppFlowy-GoTrue container on the appflowy network.

Config.Name: Use MinIO
Config.Description: Set true to use MinIO (recommended for self-hosted). Set false to use AWS S3.

Config.Name: S3 Access Key
Config.Description: S3/MinIO access key. Must match AppFlowy-MinIO MINIO_ROOT_USER.

Config.Name: S3 Secret Key
Config.Description: S3/MinIO secret key. Must match AppFlowy-MinIO MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD.

Config.Name: S3 Bucket
Config.Description: S3/MinIO bucket name. Created automatically on first start if APPFLOWY_S3_CREATE_BUCKET=true.

Config.Name: MinIO URL (internal)
Config.Description: Internal MinIO API URL for container-to-container communication.

Config.Name: S3 Presigned URL Endpoint
Config.Description: Public-facing URL for MinIO presigned file access. Clients use this to upload/download files directly.

Config.Name: Auto-create S3 Bucket
Config.Description: Automatically create the S3 bucket on startup if it does not exist.

Config.Name: S3 Region
Config.Description: AWS S3 region (e.g. us-east-1). Required only when APPFLOWY_S3_USE_MINIO=false.

Config.Name: Access Control
Config.Description: Enable permission-based workspace access control. Recommended: true.

Config.Name: DB Max Connections
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection pool size. Reduce if your Postgres hits connection limits.

Config.Name: WebSocket Mailbox Size
Config.Description: Max queued WebSocket messages per actor. Higher = more memory; lower may drop messages under load.

Config.Name: Whitelist Signup
Config.Description: Restrict signup to whitelisted emails. Requires GOTRUE_DISABLE_SIGNUP=false.

Config.Name: Guest Invite Approval
Config.Description: Require admin approval for guest invitations.

Config.Name: Search Service URL
Config.Description: Internal URL for the AppFlowy-Search container.

Config.Name: Search Request Timeout (s)
Config.Description: Timeout in seconds for requests to the search service.

Config.Name: AI Enabled
Config.Description: Enable AI features. Set false to disable entirely.

Config.Name: AI Server Host
Config.Description: Hostname of the AppFlowy-AI container on the appflowy network.

Config.Name: AI Server Port
Config.Description: Port of the AI service.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: OpenAI API key. Required for AI-powered search summaries and document embeddings. Leave empty to disable AI.

Config.Name: SMTP Host
Config.Description: SMTP host for AppFlowy Cloud mailer (e.g. smtp.gmail.com).

Config.Name: SMTP Port
Config.Description: SMTP port.

Config.Name: SMTP Username
Config.Description: SMTP authentication username.

Config.Name: SMTP Email
Config.Description: Sender email address.

Config.Name: SMTP Password
Config.Description: SMTP password.

Config.Name: SMTP TLS Kind
Config.Description: TLS mode: wrapper (port 465), required, opportunistic, or none.

Config.Name: AssemblyAI API Key
Config.Description: AssemblyAI API key for voice transcription features. Optional.

Config.Name: AssemblyAI API Base
Config.Description: AssemblyAI REST API base URL.

Config.Name: AssemblyAI Streaming Base
Config.Description: AssemblyAI streaming API base URL.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Rust log level: error, warn, info, debug, trace.

Config.Name: Environment
Config.Description: Deployment environment. Keep as production.
